item.name: Mountain Zu Horn
item.description: A curved horn that, when blown, emits a refreshing note that summons forth your mountain zu.

mount.name: Mountain Zu
mount.action: Summon forth your mountain zu, and make ready to quench your thirst for adventure.
mount.description: This subspecies of the monstrous zu is known to inhabit the mountainous regions of the Near East. Seeking to tame the ill-tempered bird, Hannish alchemists fed it a specially concocted brew, which had the desired effect while causing the creature to give off a refreshing citrus aroma.
mount.tooltip:
I can't remember the last time
I felt so refreshed!
- Tataru
